iFrame solution</p> 
<div id="iframewrapper">
   <iframe id="IFrame" src="https://${vars.baseXieCommEndpoint}/diecomm/view/iframe/${input.merchantId}/${input.customFields.accessToken}/true"  style="height:400px; width:100%" name="dieCommFrame" onload="IFrame_OnLoad();return false;">
   </iframe>
   <div>
     <button onclick="submitform();return false;" class="IFrameButton">submit payment</button>
   </div>
</div>
","jsContent":"function makePayment(accessToken,signedToken) {
  var additionalData = [{ 'key': 'accessToken', 'value': accessToken },
                        { 'key': 'signedToken', 'value': signedToken }];
  var submitBody = {
    'additionalData': additionalData,
    'submitSuccess': function (response) {
      console.log('submitSuccess');
    },
    'submitPending': function (response) {
      console.log('submitPending');      
    },
    'submitFailure': function (response) {
      console.log('submitFailure');
    },
    'submitCancel': function (response) {
      window.location.href = '/checkout/opf-payment-and-review';
    }
  };
  window.Opf.payments.checkout.submit(submitBody);
}


function submitform() {
    var iframe = document.getElementsByName('dieCommFrame');

    if (iframe) {
        $XIFrame.submit({
            iFrameId: 'dieCommFrame',
            targetUrl: iframe[0].getAttribute("src"),
            onSuccess: function (msg) {
                var message = JSON.parse(msg);
                if (message && message.data.HasPassed) {
                    var accessToken = OpfContext.customFields.accessToken;
                    var signedToken = OpfContext.customFields.signature;
                    console.log("token and signature: ",accessToken + "&s=" + signedToken);
                    console.log("message: ",message);
                    //window.location = "${secureresponse}?id=" + accessToken.value + "&s=" + signedToken.value;
                  makePayment(accessToken,signedToken);
                } else {
                    console.log(message.data.Message);
                }
            },
            onError: function (msg) {
                console.log(msg);
                alert(msg);
            }
        });
    }
}

function IFrame_OnLoad() {

    var iframe = document.getElementsByName('dieCommFrame');
    if (iframe) {
        $XIFrame.onload({
            iFrameId: 'dieCommFrame',
            targetUrl: iframe[0].getAttribute("src"),
            autosizeheight: false,
            autosizewidth: false,
            onLoadSuccess: function (msg) {
                console.log('A form for the merchant guid and access token combination is loading in the iFrame successfully.');

            },
            onError: function (msg) {
                console.log('A form for the merchant guid and access token combination has FAILED to load.');
            }
        });
    }
}","jsHash":"sha384-tuk9vyQINk3kquo4d2BcGqqYoUqPK8eZ/99jHIys8tCX1oNJ07L1MJq7A4qWrB09","jsContextFields":[{"path":"${input.customFields.accessToken}"},{"path":"${input.customFields.signature}"}],"htmlContentMode":"SEPARATE","afterRedirectHtml":null,"afterRedirectHtmlContentMode":"SEPARATE","jsUrls":[{"url":"https://cert-xiecomm.worldpay.com/diecomm/Scripts/XIFrame/XIFrame-1.2.0.js","sri":"","attributes":[{"key":"opf-load-once","value":"true"}]}]},"remoteApiOutboundMappings":[{"url":"https://${vars.baseXieCommEndpoint}/diecomm/AccessToken","authenticationIds":["{{authentication_outbound_hmac_outbound_signature_calculation_1024}}"],"method":"POST","requestContentType":"application/x-www-form-urlencoded","requestExample":"MerchantGuid={Your-GUID}&SessionRequestType={Int-Type-Code}
